_comment: Static, qualitative properties of each harness — the 'what kind of harness is this' half of the benchmark, to read alongside the empirical scorecard (benchmark.js). System-prompt sizes and positioning are sourced from the references in BENCHMARK.md; sizes marked ~ are approximate / from those write-ups, not measured here.

mock.name: mock (baseline)
mock.creator: this repo
mock.positioning: deterministic control — no model, applies known-good fix

ollama.name: ollama (raw model)
ollama.creator: this repo + Ollama
ollama.positioning: CONTROL: the model with the THINNEST possible harness (our loop's file-block parser) — isolates 'what the harness adds' vs raw qwen3:8b

pi.name: Pi
pi.creator: Mario Zechner (libGDX)
pi.positioning: MINIMALIST: sub-1k system prompt, total transparency, BYOK; the deliberate anti-bloat harness (same pi-ai stack powers OpenClaw)

goose.name: Goose
goose.creator: Block / Agentic AI Foundation
goose.positioning: model-agnostic, extensible; signature feature = YAML 'recipes' (shareable workflows); on-machine

hermes.name: Hermes Agent
hermes.creator: Nous Research
hermes.positioning: safety-first lean harness: agentskills.io skills, command-approval + sandbox backends, purpose-built headless one-shot

openclaw.name: OpenClaw
openclaw.creator: openclaw/openclaw
openclaw.positioning: personal-assistant CHAT GATEWAY (not a coding harness) with an embedded agent; included to test the contract's edges

claude.name: Claude Code
claude.creator: Anthropic
claude.positioning: batteries-included frontier harness: multi-file autonomy, sub-agents, GitHub PR review; the reference the others are measured against

codex.name: Codex CLI
codex.creator: OpenAI
codex.positioning: tool-calling coding agent run on a LOCAL model (--oss --local-provider ollama); depends on the model emitting well-formed tool calls — weak local models can't, a real model–harness-fit finding

aider.name: aider
aider.creator: Paul Gauthier
aider.positioning: the most widely-used OSS pair-programmer; edit/diff-block based (no structured tool calls), so it drives weak local models well; metered via OLLAMA_API_BASE
